testcase.name: testWriteFailure(boolean)[1]

null: failed to applyTransaction at logIndex 1 for WriteChunk java.lang.RuntimeException at org.apache.hadoop.ozone.container.common.transport.server.ratis.ContainerStateMachine.dispatchCommand(ContainerStateMachine.java:567) at org.apache.hadoop.ozone.container.common.transport.server.ratis.ContainerStateMachine.lambda$applyTransaction$9(ContainerStateMachine.java:1061) at org.apache.ratis.util.TaskQueue.lambda$submit$0(TaskQueue.java:121) at org.apache.ratis.util.LogUtils.runAndLog(LogUtils.java:38) at org.apache.ratis.util.LogUtils$1.run(LogUtils.java:78) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:572) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) 2026-04-13 18:27:08,763 [ForkJoinPool-1-worker-1] ERROR ratis.ContainerStateMachine (ContainerStateMachine.java:lambda$applyTransaction$11(1136)) - null: failed to applyTransaction at logIndex 1 for WriteChunk java.util.concurrent.CompletionException: java.lang.RuntimeException at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture.encodeThrowable(CompletableFuture.java:332) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture.completeThrowable(CompletableFuture.java:347) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$UniApply.tryFire(CompletableFuture.java:636) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture.postComplete(CompletableFuture.java:510) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture.completeExceptionally(CompletableFuture.java:2194) at org.apache.ratis.util.TaskQueue.lambda$submit$0(TaskQueue.java:131) at org.apache.ratis.util.LogUtils.runAndLog(LogUtils.java:38) at org.apache.ratis.util.LogUtils$1.run(LogUtils.java:78) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:572) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) Caused by: java.lang.RuntimeException at org.apache.hadoop.ozone.container.common.transport.server.ratis.ContainerStateMachine.dispatchCommand(ContainerStateMachine.java:567) at org.apache.hadoop.ozone.container.common.transport.server.ratis.ContainerStateMachine.lambda$applyTransaction$9(ContainerStateMachine.java:1061) at org.apache.ratis.util.TaskQueue.lambda$submit$0(TaskQueue.java:121) ... 7 more 2026-04-13 18:27:08,766 [containerOpContainerOp-fc185040-5fee-4da2-9a76-2d38e93b5ce7-1] WARN ratis.ContainerStateMachine (ContainerUtils.java:logAndReturnError(98)) - Operation: WriteChunk , Trace ID: , Message: Prev writes to container 1 failed, stopping all writes to container , Result: CONTAINER_UNHEALTHY , StorageContainerException Occurred. org.apache.hadoop.hdds.scm.container.common.helpers.StorageContainerException: Prev writes to container 1 failed, stopping all writes to container at org.apache.hadoop.ozone.container.common.transport.server.ratis.ContainerStateMachine.checkContainerHealthy(ContainerStateMachine.java:404) at org.apache.hadoop.ozone.container.common.transport.server.ratis.ContainerStateMachine.lambda$applyTransaction$9(ContainerStateMachine.java:1052) at org.apache.ratis.util.TaskQueue.lambda$submit$0(TaskQueue.java:121) at org.apache.ratis.util.LogUtils.runAndLog(LogUtils.java:38) at org.apache.ratis.util.LogUtils$1.run(LogUtils.java:78) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:572) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) 2026-04-13 18:27:08,767 [containerOpContainerOp-fc185040-5fee-4da2-9a76-2d38e93b5ce7-1] ERROR ratis.ContainerStateMachine (ContainerStateMachine.java:lambda$applyTransaction$12(1163)) - gid null : ApplyTransaction failed. cmd WriteChunk logIndex 1 msg : Prev writes to container 1 failed, stopping all writes to container Container Result: CONTAINER_UNHEALTHY

testcase.name: testApplyTransactionFailure(boolean)[2]
testcase.failure:
org.mockito.exceptions.verification.NeverWantedButInvoked:
containerDispatcher.dispatch( <any org.apache.hadoop.hdds.protocol.datanode.proto.ContainerProtos.ContainerCommandRequestProto>, <any org.apache.hadoop.ozone.container.common.transport.server.ratis.DispatcherContext> ); Never wanted here: -> at org.apache.hadoop.ozone.container.common.transport.server.ratis.TestContainerStateMachine.testApplyTransactionFailure(TestContainerStateMachine.java:190) But invoked here: -> at org.apache.hadoop.ozone.container.common.transport.server.ratis.ContainerStateMachine.dispatchCommand(ContainerStateMachine.java:567) with arguments: [cmdType: WriteChunk containerID: 1 datanodeUuid: "ae101a43-3868-4f4d-aa2a-d57d9fd1b2b7" writeChunk { blockID { containerID: 1 localID: 1 } } , APPLY_TRANSACTION-COMMIT_DATA(t:1, i:1)]
